title: Please Stop Automatically Running Searches and Applying Changes to Filters While We are Still Editing Them

posts.author: MikeInSaaS (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml:
When typing a search query, Monday.com automatically submits your query before you’re done writing it.

Similarly, when editing a filter, Monday.com automatically applies your changes before you’re done making them.

Please stop automatically submitting things. Please let us run our searches and apply our filters when we are ready.
